items.name: SHC SU-HUNTER VANA Vest Attachments
items.description:
Shadecrest PMC finest veterans. 

Equipped with state of the art equipment and gadgets to keep corporate rivals at bay including a few the suit was meant to target.

The MAG-LD Backpack and Avalon Shield are notoable advancements in the Solano Bionics branch of S.A.D where augmentation is key to advancement of warfare.

 Featuring EMP technology including surge protectors on the shield and bolstering a practical extra limb that can be versatile.

items.name: Ulacylon Colossus Vest
items.description:
The Colossus armor is a rendition of the original Juggernaut kit. 
Unlike its predecessor such armor was not made for mere entertainment but rather for total suppression of all opposing forces.

As such its updated armor, reconstructed and reinforced exoskeleton, and additional neck armor reflects this. 

(UMG members will need to refer to the adjustments posted in order to get it to look right.)

items.name: Ulacylon Deathsquad Vest Attachments (Restocked)
items.description:
If you are a bearer of this item. This means you have been accepted into the UMG Coalition Forces. 

We are a splinter of the main Deathsquad and will continue to uphold what the corporate doctrines demand.
